# Repository Map

> Annotated directory tree showing the purpose of each area.

## Project Structure

```
project-root/
  CLAUDE.md                 # Claude Code master instructions (generated by bootstrap)
  AGENTS.md                 # Codex agent routing policy (generated by bootstrap)
  .claude/
    agents/                 # Claude Code subagent definitions (generated by bootstrap)
    rules/                  # Claude Code rule sets (generated by bootstrap)
  .agents/
    skills/                 # Codex skill definitions (generated by bootstrap)
  project-docs/             # Project documentation (this system)
  src/                      # Application source code
  tests/                    # Test files
```

<!-- Update this tree as the repository structure evolves. -->

## Documentation Tree

```
project-docs/
  product/                  # Vision, scope, roadmap
  architecture/             # System overview, modules, decisions, dependencies
    decisions/              # Individual ADR files (ADR-NNN-title.md)
  context/                  # Current state, known issues, tech stack, conventions
  references/               # Repo map, key files, critical flows
  plans/                    # Implementation plans (from PLAN_TEMPLATE.md)
  sessions/                 # Session logs (from SESSION_TEMPLATE.md)
  handoffs/                 # Agent handoff notes (from HANDOFF_TEMPLATE.md)
  memory/                   # Recurring mistakes, changelog notes
  scaffold/                 # Templates for agent config (used by bootstrap)
    .claude/agents/         # Claude Code subagent templates
    .claude/rules/          # Claude Code rule templates
    .agents/skills/         # Codex skill templates
  scripts/                  # Bootstrap CLI and validators
```
